Description: Macro-enabled attachment from look-alike domain delivered to USR-0188. SPF=fail, DMARC=none.

title: Office spawned scripting engine
message: excel.exe spawned powershell.exe with encoded command on HOST-WS-047; dropped svc-host-helper.exe to %APPDATA%. No approved automation.

details: Handle to lsass.exe by dropped binary on HOST-WS-047, consistent with credential dumping.

raw_message: New RDP/SMB from HOST-WS-047 to HOST-DB-002 using sqladmin, never logged in from a workstation before.

Description: 1.8 GB compressed archive uploaded from HOST-DB-002 to external host over uncommon port, far above baseline.

title: Bulk mail quarantined
message: Marketing newsletter delivered to quarantine by spam filter. DMARC=pass, no clicks.
